unresolvedTextByHash.0f383158dd0bd30ad4ef08c874d235e0ea701f09: Hello there, [?]. Shall we hop back aboard our ship?
unresolvedTextByHash.28b8bffa0a6d86223916117a995e3017022e99a0: This isn't the can-do attitude we need, [?], but fine, we'll go back...
unresolvedTextByHash.2d58cf9ddf4befa90180c01d0cf6195b65b1f2ba: This is your bit, [?]! Take the helm when ready.
unresolvedTextByHash.34b1f29588a6dd21c53e9efbad68cc6c5b8fde2c: When you're ready, [?], just lower the salvaging hook and let's see what we can find!
unresolvedTextByHash.564ea245b7f13528e2bfda9eade2300c860fd04a: [?]! The sails need trimming! Don't miss out on that wind!
unresolvedTextByHash.7270b187736151b24a471d059791a8b046df31b1: Over to you, [?]! Take the helm when ready.
unresolvedTextByHash.7b9228c0fe20e16da2197a74c2836e3e7645a249: Well, good news, [?], because that's where you come in! You're our new helm!
unresolvedTextByHash.940fb76a56e543d33c82f039365920005819ab99: You need to trim the sails, [?]! We need to catch that wind!
unresolvedTextByHash.b59ca74593e6fd90a5532351ed650ae5fe8c0175: Sorry, [?]. If it's any consolation, you did a great job! Unfortunately, we just have to let you go.
unresolvedTextByHash.bb1e5dc1627c2149b62d5de8bdd15f49e9f6ee9c: Ah, there you are, [?]. Are you ready to hop aboard our ship?
unresolvedTextByHash.d080d76679baff721d1b5d319e905320705db0ec: Time for some salvaging, [?]! When you're ready, just lower the salvaging hook and let's see what we can find!
unresolvedTextByHash.fecd9e70e41939c2f21be26edb3e993c5827d4ef: Pleased to meet you, [?]. I'm Anne, and this is Will.
